creator: fbsdbug@edcrowe.com
text:
Created attachment 243679
asmc patch for macmini6, macbookpro10,1, and macbookpro8,3

Hello,
I used the macOS smcdump utility to get the T* values for a MacBookPro10,1 and a MacMini6,2. I've been running with this patch on each machine for a few weeks and have not had any issues.

If you want me to split the patch out for each machine type and resubmit, please let me know.
